retrieved_result: BACnet for Linux BACnet for Linux Summary Open-Source BACnet Protocol ( www.bacnet.org) stack for Linux. This project's goal was to develop a complete implementation of the BACnet protocol for use by anyone who wishes to give their products BACnet communication capability. Note: This project is no longer active. See
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result describes a BACnet protocol stack for Linux, not integrated development environments or software development IDEs; therefore it is not relevant to the query.
